title: Better Rotten Flesh to Leather
description: This simple datapack allows you to smelt Rotten Flesh into Leather in a Furnace, Smoker, or Campfire.
body:
Adds the ability to directly obtain leather from cooking rottenflesh!!! 

This can be done with:
- The Furnace
- A Smoker
- A Campfire / Soul Campfire

This Datapack only adds the 3 recipes and is compatible with the latest versions! Datapack will be updated frequently.
